title: Two-player deterministic turn flow
intent: Ship a deterministic two-player artillery turn loop with authoritative command processing and replay-safe state transitions, with spec-controller governance validation on PR automation.

scenarios.description: Player 1 creates a match and Player 2 joins successfully.
Only the current turn owner can fire, and invalid turn attempts are rejected.
Replay with same seed and command sequence yields identical final snapshot hash.

riskNotes: Risk: command dedup and SSE ordering regressions can desync clients. Mitigation: idempotency tests + stream replay tests in CI.
